tagline: Custom cabinet retrofit franchise backed by a corporate sales center, proprietary tech, and a no-employee ownership model built for growth.
description_short: Art of Drawers installs custom pull-out shelving and cabinet organization in existing homes without requiring a storefront or employees. Franchisees act as head coaches managing a contractor team while corporate runs inbound lead generation, media buying, and appointment scheduling. The model suits executive-profile buyers seeking a scalable, low-overhead entry into a niche home services segment with minimal direct franchise competition.
market_intelligence_insight: The US home organizers and storage market is valued at 12.05 billion in 2025 and projected to reach 15.21 billion by 2030 at a 4.78% CAGR. The cabinet organizer segment is forecast to grow at 9.1% CAGR through 2033, driven by aging housing stock, kitchen remodel demand, and consumer focus on functional storage.
item_19_headline: Reporting outlet (combined 1+ territories) generated $819593 in gross sales for 2024.
ongoing_support: field support,technology platform,LMS,sales support center,ongoing marketing support,advisory council,operations manual,refresher training
